revision.text: {{Game |Guid=d48e18a0-cb81-41fc-8209-86acbf489790 |Name=Stronghold 4 |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--wefewafew-06-08-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ss_ee39196abb86dd92acb80fcf87f5366f3c1fbeaf-1920x1080-06-08-2026.jpg |Deck=A prequel in Firefly Studios' long-running castle simulator. |ReleaseDateType=Year |YearPart=2026 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Pre Release Public Testing, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Online, Concepts/Player vs Player, Concepts/Cooperative Play, Concepts/Steam Achievements, Concepts/Steam Workshop |Developers=Companies/FireFly Studios Ltd |Genres=Genres/Simulation |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/FireFly Studios Ltd |Themes=Themes/Medieval }}

{{Game |Guid=280425a8-138f-4e07-84ad-e53555e1095c |Name=Stuntman: Hollywood |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--screenshot-2026-06-09-at-3-40-36-pm-06-09-2026.png |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--1500x500-06-02-2026.jpg |Deck=The Stuntman series returns for the first time in 20 years and now features licensed vehicles and stunts from Universal Pictures. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Characters=Characters/K I T T |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Sequel, Concepts/Licensed Cars |Developers=Companies/Saber Interactive |Franchises=Franchises/Stuntman |Genres=Genres/Driving Racing |Locations=Locations/Hollywood |Objects=Objects/DeLorean DMC 12 |Platforms=Platforms/PlayStation 5, Platforms/Xbox Series X S, Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Saber Interactive }}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Game | Name=Summoners War | Guid=3030-49061 | Deck=Summoners War is a mobile RPG for Android and iOS. It has PvP with a ladder that resets weekly. Summon rare monsters and battle with your friends or against the computer! | ReleaseDate=2014-06-12 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/PAX_East_2018,Concepts/Reptilian_Humanoid | Developers=Companies/Com2Us | Franchises= | Genres=Genres/Role_Playing | Locations= | Objects= | Platforms=Platforms/Android,Platforms/iPad,Platforms/iPhone | Publishers=Companies/Com2Us | Games=Games/Calibria_Crystal_Guardians,Games/Exos_Heroes,Games/Raid_Shadow_Legends | Themes=Themes/Fantasy | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3035221-summoners%20war_%20sky%20arena.jpg }}

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Game |Guid=75fae043-0ef0-40de-894c-6958b0fb7138 |Name=Takeover 2 |Deck=Take to the streets solo or with a partner in this fast paced, high-impact arcade beat ’em up. Takeover returns with refined gameplay, upgraded visuals and a pulse-pounding new soundtrack. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-09-10 |Characters=Characters/Ethan Rivers, Characters/Connor Grayson, Characters/Megan Brooks |Concepts=Concepts/Sequel, Concepts/Digitized Sprites, Concepts/Pseudo 3D, Co..."

Takeover returns with refined gameplay, upgraded visuals and a pulse-pounding new soundtrack. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-09-10 |Characters=Characters/Ethan Rivers, Characters/Connor Grayson, Characters/Megan Brooks |Concepts=Concepts/Sequel, Concepts/Digitized Sprites, Concepts/Pseudo 3D, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Indie, Concepts/Steam Remote Play Together |Developers=Companies/Pelikan13 |Genres=Genres/Brawler |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Pelikan13 |Themes=Themes/Crime }}

page.title: Games/Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Tactical Takedown/Credits

revision.text: {{Game |Guid=ae16218f-e7d6-4649-9d67-c3348cdd7580 |Name=TerraTech Legion |Image=Terratech-legion-astdn.jpg |Deck=Build the ultimate battle vehicle block by block and survive waves of robotic foes, ramming them at speed and shooting infinite projectiles. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-04-30 |Developers=Companies/Payload Studios |Platforms=Platforms/PC }}

{{Game |Guid=3c379239-0d26-48b3-a8ad-669cb1669641 |Name=Terrinoth: Heroes of Descent |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--images-06-09-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ss_82fa75938c52075870ba51d8179169796a7b2530-1920x1080-06-09-2026.jpg |Deck=A tactical cooperative RPG based on the popular tabletop game. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-06-07 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Based on Tabletop RPG, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Online, Concepts/Cooperative Play, Concepts/Tactical Turn Based Combat |Developers=Companies/Artefacts Studio |Genres=Genres/Role Playing |Platforms=Platforms/PC, Platforms/PlayStation 5 |Themes=Themes/Fantasy }}

revision.comment: create apothecary diaries browser games page
revision.text: {{Game |Guid=54e714eb-0dff-4096-bbbb-964ada9c2382 |Name=The Apothecary Diaries Palace Chronicles |Aliases=Apothecary Chronicles |Image=Kusuriyalogo.png |Caption=The Apothecary Diaries Palace Chronicles is a simulation browser game adaptation of "The Apothecary Diaries" anime. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-06-15 |Concepts=Concepts/Games Based on Anime, Concepts/Adventurers, Concepts/Japanese Mythology |Developers=Companies/CTW |Genres=Genres/Text Adventure, Genres/Strategy, Genres/Simulation |Publishers=Companies/CTW |Games=Games/Chrome |Themes=Themes/Anime, Themes/Alternate Historical }} The Apothecary Diaries Palace Chronicles is a free-to-play browser-based character-raising simulation set in the world of the anime The Apothecary Diaries. Players raise Maomao, a young apothecary, and solve stage-based incidents within the imperial palace and pleasure district by combining apothecary knowledge with item compounding. The game features the original Medical Office facility system, over thirty-five characters from the source series with exclusive newly drawn illustrations, and full multilingual support across Japanese, English, Traditional Chinese and Korean.

revision.text: {{Game |Guid=efa22259-3c57-4cf4-a632-ffa6595bec9d |Name=The Dark West |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--library_capsule_2lllx-06-01-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--library_hero_2xuu-06-01-2026.jpg |Deck=An action RPG set in a fantasy western. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Shark 3D, Concepts/Isometric Viewpoint, Concepts/Magic, Concepts/Hack and Slash, Concepts/Random Loot |Developers=Companies/Black Hand Studios |Genres=Genres/Action, Genres/Role Playing |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Black Hand Studios |Themes=Themes/Western, Themes/Fantasy }}
